name: MGE RPG + (AUTHORIAL LOREBOOKS!)
description:
NOTE: THIS BOT MAY NOT WORK WELL WITH JLLM вҖ” For obvious reasons, since JLLM is a damn piece of shit, the bot may give incorrect information about characters or places, or invent conflicting information, so don't blame yourself or me, the fault lies with your proxy or lack of it. This bot was tested with DeepSeek V3 and lower and worked perfectly.

гҖҺWe're on fire today, aren't we? This is another one of my projects that I've been working on for a few months now. I put a lot of care and attention into making the bot and especially the Lorebook! Seriously, I don't know how many nights I stayed up just to make the SIX Lorebooks. They were all handmade, completely original! I hope you like this bot too guys рҹ’ӘгҖҸ

гҖҺThe inspiration for creating this bot clearly comes from the lack of MGE games! I only managed to find one, and apparently it's unfinished too, so it wouldn't be worth playing. So with that in mind, I decided to make my own RPG based on this incredible world, and when I commit to something, I like to see it through to the end. So know that the bot is veeery detailed and full of content.гҖҸ

Originality: Content and art belong to Kenkou Cross, the creator of this world. I simply compiled everything into a bot and books.

AND NOW I HAVE BOTH ENCYCLOPEDIAS!! рҹҘірҹ”Ҙ

в—Ҙв—Ҳв—Өв•җв•җв”…в•җв•җв•җв•җаҪҢб–«в—үб–ӯаҪ‘в•җв•җв•җв•җв”…в•җв•җв—Ҙв—Ҳв—Ө

в”Ҹ в”Җ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ғв”Ғр“ҠҲвҢҳр“Ҡүв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Җ в”“

Backstory:

You are a normal person who ended up being summoned into the world of Monster Girl Encyclopedia, without having any idea about this world, but luckily you were brought near a human village where you found protection. After helping an old man from the village a few days later, you received the Encyclopedia as a thank you, a book that contained information on all the Monster Girls in this world... Or maybe not all of them yet?

в”— в”Җ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ғв”Ғр“ҠҲвҢҳр“Ҡүв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Җ в”ӣ

в—Ҙв—Ҳв—Өв•җв•җв”…в•җв•җв•җв•җаҪҢб–«в—үб–ӯаҪ‘в•җв•җв•җв•җв”…в•җв•җв—Ҙв—Ҳв—Ө

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғајәај»в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

For more Monster Girl Encyclopedia, check out the tabs at the bottom of my profile. So far we have the following bots from this series:

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғајәај»в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

в—Ҙв—Ҳв—Өв•җв•җв”…в•җв•җв•җв•җаҪҢб–«в—үб–ӯаҪ‘в•җв•җв•җв•җв”…в•җв•җв—Ҙв—Ҳв—Ө

б–«в”үв”үв”үв•Қв”…в•Қв”үв”үв”үб–ӯ

Note:

It is recommended that you use Chat Memory to enter your information such as the names of people you met, your orbs and any other information that you think is important to save so as not to lose it during the chat.

Reminder: For better Lorebook activation, include keywords related to the topic you want to activate when writing your responses to the bot, whether it's a specific Monster Girl or a particular place in the lore.

б–«в”үв”үв”үв•Қв”…в•Қв”үв”үв”үб–ӯ<
